title: WardenEssentials
description: WardenEssentials is a lightweight and powerful Minecraft server plugin that adds essential quality-of-life commands for admins and players, Perfect for building, server management, and everyday gameplay improvements.
body:
***PLUGIN DEVELOPMENT MAY START IN SOME TIME AGAIN***

**CHANGE ---> THIS PLUGIN MUST REQUIRE WARDENLIB TO RUN**

**PLEASE REPORT ISSUES IN THIS PLUGINS SOURCE CODE REPO**

_**WardenEssentials is designed to make Minecraft server administration and building faster, easier, and more enjoyable.**_
## Features:

/wegive <player> <item> <amount> – Give any player any item with a custom quantity.

/weup [height] – Instantly teleport upwards and place a block beneath you.

**All others cmds you can see in '/wessentials help'.**

**Fully permission-based system for secure command usage.**

**Lightweight & lag-free — optimized for all server sizes.**

Simple, beginner-friendly command syntax.

## Permissions:

**wardenessentials.give – Access to /wegive.**

**wardenessentials.up – Access to /weup.**

**And also for other cmds.**
